parameters.query: SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, ATTEMPT_COUNT, MISSING_FIELDS, VALIDATION_ERRORS, EXTRACTED_SO_FAR FROM EASYFORM.APP.PENDING_DUE_FOR_RETRY;

UPDATE EASYFORM.APP.PENDING_REQUESTS SET ATTEMPT_COUNT = :1, LAST_EMAIL_SENT_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), NEXT_RETRY_AT = DATEADD(hour, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()), UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE USER_ID = :2;
UPDATE EASYFORM.APP.PENDING_REQUESTS SET STATUS = 'discarded', UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM EASYFORM.APP.PENDING_TO_DISCARD);
